data.title: Robotaxi Exit To 'Clear The Way' For GM To License Tesla FSD, Says Gary Black — Move Will Save The Mary Barra-Led Company $1B A Year
data.description: Future Fund LLC Managing Partner Gary Black highlighted on Tuesday, Dec. 10, 2024, that General Motors Co. is abandoning its robotaxi ambitions to save $1 billion annually, marking a significant shift in the autonomous vehicle race.

data.title: Sam Altman Once Thought Robinhood's Gold Credit Card Was A 'Ridiculous Marketing Stunt,' But Now He Likes It — What Changed The OpenAI CEO's Mind?
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman praised Robinhood Markets Inc.'s new Gold credit card for its design quality, on Tuesday, Dec. 10, 2024, adding to the growing buzz around the fintech company's latest product offering.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Says Bank Can Consider Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading If Regulations Allow
data.description: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE:GS) CEO David Solomon said on Tuesday that the investment banking giant might explore becoming a spot market maker for leading cryptocurrencies if more regulatory clarity is provided.

data.title: Dogecoin's Cycle Peak Projected $8-10 By Top Trader Amid Pullback, But Here's Why You Should Be Careful
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has taken a sharp U-turn this week amid the broader cryptocurrency market’s decline, but that hasn’t deterred optimists.

data.title: Justin Sun's Takes A Cheeky Dig At Microsoft For Rejecting Bitcoin Strategy: 'Highly Recommend Buying It When BTC reaches $1M'
